hero.subtitle: Because the best meals are the ones you make with love — even if it's just for you. Simple recipes, cozy vibes, no stress.

home.soloSubtitle: Quick, easy recipes sized just for you. No leftovers sitting in the fridge for days!
home.tipText: Prep your ingredients before you start cooking. It makes everything feel calm and organized — like a real cooking show, but cozier.
home.quickPicksSubtitle: Pick a vibe and we'll find recipes for you
home.pickBreakfastDesc: Easy morning meals to start your day right
home.pickMainCourseDesc: Hearty dinners for a cozy night in
home.pickDessertDesc: Sweet treats because you deserve it
home.pickQuickDesc: Super fast recipes when you're short on time

recipes.title: Recipe Collection
recipes.subtitle: Your personal cookbook — pick something that makes you happy today

recipeDetail.notFoundHint: This recipe wandered off somewhere... let's find you something else!

about.title: About
about.subtitle: A little kitchen companion made with love
about.story1: Cooking for yourself should feel like a treat, not a chore. This little app is here to keep you company in the kitchen — with easy recipes, cute vibes, and zero judgment.
about.story2: Whether you're making a quick breakfast before work or trying something new on a lazy Sunday, we've got you. Every recipe is sized for one (or two, if you want leftovers).
about.story3: Put on your favorite playlist, pour yourself something nice, and let's cook something wonderful together.
about.feature3Desc: Every meal is a little act of self-care

contact.title: Say Hi!
contact.subtitle: Got a recipe suggestion? Found a bug? Just want to chat?
contact.messagePlaceholder: Share a recipe idea, say hi, or just send a cute emoji...

footer.tagline:
Cooking for yourself is an act of love.
Your cozy kitchen companion.
